headline: JPMorgan's Das on Opportunities for Investors Amid Market Volatility
summary: JPMorgan's Mixo Das says investors can "just choose to look through this volatility" when it comes to geopolitical events. He also tells Bloomberg Television that some investors are looking at staples, energy, materials and industrials as a sector trade, or using options to hedge.

content.title: JPMorgan's Das on Opportunities for Investors Amid Market Volatility
content.description: JPMorgan's Mixo Das says investors can "just choose to look through this volatility" when it comes to geopolitical events. He also tells Bloomberg Television that some investors are looking at staples, energy, materials and industrials as a sector trade, or using options to hedge.
content.summary: JPMorgan's Mixo Das says investors can "just choose to look through this volatility" when it comes to geopolitical events. He also tells Bloomberg Television that some investors are looking at staples, energy, materials and industrials as a sector trade, or using options to hedge.

headline: Dave Cote to Participate in the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
summary: NEW YORK, March 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GPGI, Inc. (NYSE: GPGI), a diversified multi-industry platform for companies with great positions in good industries, today announced Dave Cote, GPGI's Executive Chairman, is participating in the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference. Dave will participate in a fireside chat at the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in Washington, D.C. on Monday, March 16, 2026, at 1:45 p.m. EDT. A live webcast of the event will be available on the Events & Presentations

headline: Chase Freedom® Announces Q2 2026 5% Cash Back Categories: Amazon, Whole Foods Market, Chase Travel℠ and Feeding America®
summary: WILMINGTON, Del., March 16, 2026--Today, Chase announced that Freedom and Freedom Flex cardmembers can earn 5% cash back on Amazon, Whole Foods Market and Chase Travel purchases, plus donations to Feeding America from April 1 through June 30, 2026. The new categories are versatile and practical for day-to-day spending, so cardmembers can start planning everything from next week’s grocery haul to springtime vacations.

content.title: Chase Freedom® Announces Q2 2026 5% Cash Back Categories: Amazon, Whole Foods Market, Chase Travel℠ and Feeding America®
content.summary: WILMINGTON, Del., March 16, 2026--Today, Chase announced that Freedom and Freedom Flex cardmembers can earn 5% cash back on Amazon, Whole Foods Market and Chase Travel purchases, plus donations to Feeding America from April 1 through June 30, 2026. The new categories are versatile and practical for day-to-day spending, so cardmembers can start planning everything from next week’s grocery haul to springtime vacations.

headline: JPMorgan Crypto Ponzi Lawsuits Put Compliance And Valuation In Focus
summary: JPMorgan Chase, ticker NYSE:JPM, is facing multiple proposed class action lawsuits tied to an alleged $328 million crypto Ponzi scheme. Plaintiffs claim the bank did not stop or report suspicious transfers linked to a customer accused of running the fraud. The cases focus on the bank’s anti money laundering controls and its role in monitoring crypto related transactions flowing through traditional accounts. NYSE:JPM last closed at $283.44, with the share price sitting alongside a 23.6%...
